transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HealthLine Navigator. What symptoms are you experiencing today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: I've had a headache since this morning, and now my left arm feels kind of numb and heavy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. On a scale of one to ten, how would you rate the headache?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe a six. It's also a little hard to talk, my words feel slurred sometimes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I'll note that. Have you taken any medication for the headache today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Just some ibuprofen, about two hours ago. It hasn't really helped much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood. I'd recommend scheduling a routine appointment with your primary care doctor within the next week to review this.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: A week? The numbness is getting worse, and I'm a little scared.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I hear you. Let's go ahead and get you set up with Dr. Ramirez on Thursday at 2pm, does that work?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: I guess so, if that's what you think is best.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're confirmed for Thursday. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all I think. Thanks.
